app.name: JID
app.description: Connecting talent with opportunities — jobs, mentorship, and career growth

home.title: Welcome to JID
home.subtitle: Your platform for employment and career mentorship

featuredMentors.title: Mentors of the month

public.privateGateMessage: Sign in with an approved company or mentor account to view discoverable profiles, or ask the owner to make their profile public.
public.emptyStateMessage: Complete the steps below to introduce yourself to companies and mentors on JID.
public.wizardSubtitle: Each step unlocks more visibility to employers.
public.completionBannerHint: Complete the remaining steps to maximize your visibility.
public.suspendedAdminMessage: This profile is suspended and hidden from all non-staff viewers.
public.staffPreviewHint: Staff preview — profile content below is not public.

public.commitmentScoreHint: This company's own hiring commitment on JID — not a comparison to other employers.
public.unclaimedMessage: Claim this profile to manage jobs, respond to candidates, and build your employer brand on JID.
public.activeJobsPostedHint: {count} roles posted in the last 12 months
public.activeJobsTodo: Full job listings will appear here when the Job Board module is connected.
public.partnerMentorsTodo: Partner mentor roster will appear here when the Mentorship module is connected.

public.staffPendingMessage: This mentor profile has status "{status}" and is hidden from public visitors.

edit.universityHint: University and college are updated during onboarding for now.
edit.avatarUploadFailed: Upload failed — paste a URL instead
edit.headline: Headline

privacy.title: Profile privacy
privacy.subtitle: Control who can discover your profile on JID.
privacy.visibilityPrivateHint: Only you and JID staff can open your profile. Companies and mentors cannot find you.
privacy.visibilityDiscoverableHint: Verified companies and approved mentors can view your profile when additional toggles below are enabled.
privacy.showToCompaniesHint: الشركات الموثّقة فقط ترى ملفك عند تفعيل هذا الخيار.
privacy.showInUniversityStatsHint: جامعتك ترى إحصائيات مجمّعة فقط — دون بيانات تعريف شخصية.

emails.title: Manage email addresses
emails.subtitle: Add additional emails for applications and notifications.

jobPrivacy.title: Job privacy
jobPrivacy.subtitle: Control what recruiters see when you apply to opportunities.
jobPrivacy.showToRecruitersHint: Allows verified companies to open your profile when reviewing your application.
jobPrivacy.allowDirectContactHint: Companies may contact you directly through the platform.
jobPrivacy.showApplicationHistoryHint: Your past application status is visible when applying again.

becomeMentor.pageSubtitle: Share your experience and guide job seekers on JID.
becomeMentor.submitSuccess: Your mentor application was submitted for review.

step1.title: Professional information
step1.subtitle: Tell us about your current role and experience.
step1.headline: Professional headline
step1.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. Product leader helping early-career talent

step2.title: Expertise areas
step2.subtitle: Add up to 5 areas where you can mentor others.
step2.areasHint: Press Enter to add each tag (max 5).

step3.title: Mentor bio
step3.subtitle: Write a short bio and choose languages and preferred mediums.
step3.bioPlaceholder: Describe how you mentor and what mentees can expect…
step3.languagesHint: Select all languages you can mentor in.
step3.mediumsHint: How do you prefer to meet mentees?

step4.title: Verification
step4.subtitle: We verify mentors via LinkedIn — no document uploads required.
step4.noUploadsNote: File uploads are not required at this stage. Staff may request additional verification later.

step5.title: Review your application
step5.subtitle: This is how your mentor card will appear after approval.

pending.title: Application under review
pending.body: Your mentor application has been submitted. Staff will review it and you will be notified when a decision is made.

hero.title: Find a mentor
hero.subtitle: Connect with experienced professionals who accept mentorship requests on JID.

empty.coldStartBody: We are building our mentor community. Get notified when mentors matching your interests become available.
empty.noMatchesBody: Try broadening your filters or reset them to see all mentors.
empty.notifyCta: Notify me when mentors are available
empty.notifySuccess: We will notify you when matching mentors join.
empty.notifyError: Could not save your notification request.
empty.notifyHint: Sign in to receive notifications when mentors become available.

request.title: Request mentorship
request.subtitle: Send a context-rich request to {name}. Your profile snapshot is attached automatically.
request.snapshotNote: This snapshot is saved with your request and will not change if you update your profile later.
request.intentLabel: What do you hope to get from this mentorship?
request.intentPlaceholder: Describe your goals, challenges, and what you would like help with…
request.preferredMediumPlaceholder: How would you like to meet? (optional)

hub.title: Mentor hub
hub.subtitle: Manage requests, sessions, and your mentor presence.

requests.declineDescription: Please share a brief reason — this is required.
requests.declinePlaceholder: Why are you declining this request?

upcoming.title: Upcoming sessions
upcoming.body: View confirmed meetings on your Radar.

workshops.empty: No workshops yet. Create your first one.
workshops.chipHint: Published workshops with a future date appear as a gold chip on your mentor card.

settings.acceptingHint: When off, your card and profile show as unavailable.
settings.shareHint: Download a 1200×630 card for social media.

list.title: Messages
list.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted mentorship conversations.
list.emptyBody: When a mentorship request is accepted, your conversation will appear here.

chat.keysMissing: Encryption keys are not ready on this device

schedule.title: Meeting proposal
schedule.dialogDescription: Propose a time for your mentorship meeting. Your mentee will confirm before it is added to Radar.
schedule.invalidDate: Choose a valid date and time.

radar.title: Radar
radar.subtitle: Track applications and upcoming mentorship sessions.
radar.error: Could not load radar data. Please try again.
radar.emptyBody: Confirmed meetings and feedback prompts will appear here.
radar.companyStatusUpdate: The company updated your application status

mobile.noMoves: This card moves automatically and cannot be moved manually.

saved.message: You haven't saved any opportunities yet.

applied.message: You haven't applied to any jobs yet.

meeting.feedbackBody: Your feedback helps mentors improve and updates their rating.
meeting.feedbackDismissed: You can rate this session later from Radar.

cta.title: Build your Harvard-style CV
cta.description: Create a professional PDF résumé pre-filled from your profile — ready for job applications.

builder.title: CV builder
builder.createdBanner: We created a draft from your profile. Review each section and export when ready.
builder.formPlaceholderBody: This column will host the active section editor. Server data is loaded via TanStack Query.

header.linkAnchorHint: Shown as clickable anchor text in the PDF (e.g. “LinkedIn”), not the raw URL.
header.customLinkHint: Label appears as the clickable anchor text in your PDF.
header.saveError: Could not save — check your connection

education.emptyDescription: Add your degrees, certificates, and training. You can reorder entries by dragging.
education.reorderHint: Drag entries to change order in your CV.
education.courseworkHint: Comma-separated or short list — shown in the PDF education section.
education.saveError: Could not save — check your connection

experience.emptyDescription: Add internships, jobs, and volunteer roles. Drag to reorder how they appear on your CV.
experience.reorderHint: Drag entries to change order in your CV.
experience.achievementsHint: Start each bullet with a strong action verb (e.g. Built, Led, Reduced). Focus on impact and measurable results.
experience.saveError: Could not save — check your connection

skills.technicalSkillsHint: Add tools, languages, and frameworks — shown as a comma-separated list in your PDF.
skills.languagesHint: Add languages with proficiency level — shown in the Skills section of your PDF.
skills.saveError: Could not save — check your connection

additional.groupedHint: Items are grouped by category in your PDF, matching the Additional section.
additional.title: Title
additional.saveError: Could not save — check your connection

disabled.missing_full_name: Add your full name to export
disabled.missing_education: Add at least one education entry
disabled.missing_experience: Add at least one experience entry

overflow.warning: Your CV is approximately {count} pages. Harvard-style resumes should fit on one page — consider shortening content.
